---
title : "Gradient descent comparison"
author : "Thimoté Dupuch"
date : today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: zephyr
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo : false
#| output : false
using Pkg
Pkg.activate("..")
```


```{julia}
#| output : false
using LinearAlgebra, Random, Statistics, CairoMakie
```


```{julia}
#| output : false
#| echo : false
CairoMakie.set_theme!(theme_latexfonts())
CairoMakie.activate!(type = "svg")
```

```{julia}
blue, orange, green, pink, teal, red, yellow = Makie.wong_colors()
```


```{julia}
#| output : false

using LinearAlgebra
using Random
using CairoMakie
```


##### Build quadratic problem
```{julia}
#| output : false
function build_problem(d, spectrum_fn)
    Hrand = randn(d, d)
    U, _, _ = svd(Hrand)

    λ = spectrum_fn(1:d)
    H = U * Diagonal(λ) * U'

    # Largest eigenvalue (since λ is known)
    L = maximum(λ)

    # Ground truth
    wstar = U * randn(d)
    wstar /= sqrt(wstar' * H * wstar)

    return H, wstar, L
end
```
##### Gradient descent
```{julia}
#| output : false
function run_gd(H, wstar, L, maxiter)
    d = length(wstar)
    w = zeros(d)
    F = zeros(maxiter)

    for t in 1:maxiter
        diff = w - wstar
        F[t] = 0.5 * dot(diff, H * diff)
        w -= (1 / L) * (H * diff)
    end

    return F
end
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
function plot_gd_comparison()
    Random.seed!(1)

    d = 1000
    maxiter = 5000

    # Two spectra
    H1, wstar1, L1 = build_problem(d, k -> 1.0 ./ k)
    H2, wstar2, L2 = build_problem(d, k -> 1.0 ./ (k .^ 2))

    Fw  = run_gd(H1, wstar1, L1, maxiter)
    Fw2 = run_gd(H2, wstar2, L2, maxiter)

    t = 0:maxiter-1

    # Theoretical bound (avoid division by zero at t=0)
    bound = similar(Fw)
    bound[1] = NaN
    bound[2:end] .= (1/8) * sum(wstar2 .^ 2) ./ t[2:end]

    fig = Figure(size=(600, 300))

    ax1 = Axis(fig[1, 1],
        xlabel = L"t",
        ylabel = L"\log_{10}[ F(\theta_t) - F(\eta_\ast) ]",
        title = "Semilogarithmic scale",
        limits = (0, 5000, -6, 0),
        xticks = 0:2_000:6_000,
        yticks = -6:2:0
    )

    lines!(ax1, t, log10.(Fw), label = L"\lambda_k \sim 1/k")
    lines!(ax1, t, log10.(Fw2), label = L"\lambda_k \sim 1/k^2", color=red)
    lines!(ax1, t, log10.(bound), label = "Bound", linestyle=:dash, color=:black)
    axislegend(ax1, position =:lb)

    ax2 = Axis(fig[1, 2],
        xlabel = L"\log_{10}(t)",
        ylabel = L"\log_{10}[F(\theta_t) - F(\theta_\ast)]",
        title = "Full logarithmic scale",
        limits = (0, log10(5000), -6, 0),
        yticks = -6:2:0
    )

    lines!(ax2, log10.(t), log10.(Fw),label = L"\lambda_k \sim 1/k")
    lines!(ax2, log10.(t), log10.(Fw2),label = L"\lambda_k \sim 1/k^2", color=red)
    lines!(ax2, log10.(t), log10.(bound),label = "Bound", linestyle=:dash, color=:black)
    axislegend(ax2, position =:lb)

    fig
end
```


```{julia}
plot_gd_comparison()
```
